name: Water Intake Calculator
description: Industrial-grade water consumption estimation tool based on ISO 14046, Lean Six Sigma principles, and WERC water efficiency guidelines. Calculates total water intake, hidden losses, and provides actionable recommendations.

inputs.label: Number of Employees
inputs.businessContext: Total full-time equivalent employees on site.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total full-time equivalent employees on site.

inputs.label: Work Days per Year
inputs.businessContext: Number of operating days per year.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of operating days per year.

inputs.label: Average Water Use per Person per Day
inputs.businessContext: Estimated daily water consumption per employee (drinking, sanitation, cleaning).

label_i18n.en: Average Water Use per Person per Day

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated daily water consumption per employee (drinking, sanitation, cleaning).

inputs.label: Process Water Intensity
inputs.businessContext: Water used per unit of production output (e.g., liters per product).

businessContext_i18n.en: Water used per unit of production output (e.g., liters per product).

inputs.label: Leakage Factor
inputs.businessContext: Estimated percentage of water lost due to leaks in the distribution system.

businessContext_i18n.en: Estimated percentage of water lost due to leaks in the distribution system.

inputs.label: Water Recycling Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of process water that is treated and reused.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of process water that is treated and reused.

inputs.label: Seasonal Adjustment Factor
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier to account for seasonal variations (e.g., summer peak).

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiplier to account for seasonal variations (e.g., summer peak).

inputs.label: Industry Type
inputs.businessContext: Select the industry sector to apply appropriate benchmarks.

businessContext_i18n.en: Select the industry sector to apply appropriate benchmarks.

rules.message: When recycling rate is positive, process water intensity must be greater than zero.
Leakage factor should be considered only if employees are present.
Seasonal factor must be between 0.5 and 2.0.

thresholds.message: Total water intake exceeds 1,000,000 liters per year. Consider water conservation audit.
Leakage factor above 15% indicates significant water loss. Immediate inspection recommended.
Recycling rate below 10% suggests potential for improvement.
